domain: B2B SaaS, Corporate Training, Health & Safety (SST)

headings.strategy: Tracking-tight for main headings. Uppercase with tracking-[0.2em] for overlines and micro-labels to convey an industrial, architectural precision.

body.strategy: Clean, highly legible for dense information.

forms_tables.strategy: Maximum legibility at small sizes (12-14px) for data tables and inputs.

layout_spacing.strategy: Control Room Grid for dashboards (tight gap-4/6, dense data). Tetris Grid for landing page (gap-8/12, asymmetric, visual impact).
layout_spacing.container_padding: Containers with borders must use p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision. Mobile images max-h-[80vh].
layout_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical look). Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no shadow for default state. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow on hover.

components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Solid backgrounds, 1px borders, focus rings using primary blue.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Use Open Sans. Left-align text, right-align numbers. Strict 1px border-b on rows.
components.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary buttons must use #1E4484 with white text. Hover state must explicitly define color.
components.dialogs: Shadcn Dialog. Use for modals (e.g., student details, QR generation). Add subtle backdrop blur.
components.cards: Shadcn Card. Use for Dashboard KPIs. Flat, rectangular, minimal border-radius (max 8px).
components.charts: Shadcn Charts (Recharts). Use for Dashboard stats. Colors: Primary blue and secondary blue.
components.signature: HTML Canvas element for touch signature, styled with a distinct bounding box (border-dashed border-2 border-mid_gray).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Dark text on light backgrounds. White text on primary buttons.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

image_urls.description: Cinematic heavy-duty industrial carabiner attached to a bright safety harness rope. Symbol of safety, compliance, and trust.
Abstract, minimal corporate background with subtle technical grid lines.
Group of workers in protective gear engaged in factory training.
Man standing on orange metal bar wearing safety harness during daytime.
Construction worker balancing on scaffolding with helmet and vest in urban setting.

motion_and_interactions: Micro-interactions for feedback. Hover states (-translate-y-1, shadow-lg) on cards. Smooth transitions (transition-all duration-200) for all buttons and links.
icons_and_assets: lucide-react for standard icons, highly legible and consistent stroke widths.
instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the exact colors provided: Primary #1E4484, Secondary #004DA6, Dark Gray #3D3D3D, Mid Gray #737373, White #FFFFFF.
Implement Oswald for headings (H1-H4), Roboto for paragraphs, Open Sans specifically for form inputs and table data.
Do not use border-radius larger than 8px (rounded-md/lg). The UI must feel sharp, structured, and compliant.
Dashboards must use the 'Control Room' grid layout: tight gaps, dense data, strict hierarchy.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on EVERY interactive element and form input for testability.
The login/auth screen should use 'auth_background' for a premium SaaS feel.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layout, and Shadcn UI heavily for the Admin dashboards.
Support both light and dark mode, but the primary visual language must optimize for Light mode legibility (B2B SaaS standard).
